examples: In this paper, extraction of liposoluble pigment from dry powder of tangerine peel was studied.
Objective:to research the chemical constituents of the liposoluble compounds from the stem and bark of Macaranga hemsleyana Pax & Hoffm.
The extraction rates of liposoluble components with soxhlet extraction was 97.206%, the components examined, 32 of the 37 were identified.
